name: Pork, Herb and Sultana Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and gently fry the minced pork until it changes color. Press out any lumps with a fork.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the fried pork and mix well.
3. Ensure the stuffing is thoroughly combined.
4. Use this stuffing for your turkey, as described in the accompanying posts from various parts of the world.
The plump sweet sultanas pair nicely with turkey meat, adding richness and moistness. The generous amount of fresh herbs elevates this stuffing beyond ordinary levels.
